category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a lightweight speech recognition engine for mobile devices; source_facts.homepage is CMUSphinx.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cmu-pocketsphinx; official CMUSphinx documentation and repository identify the project as PocketSphinx.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official CMUSphinx site; official CMUSphinx wiki provides PocketSphinx documentation and the official GitHub README is a project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/cmusphinx/pocketsphinx, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies speech recognition; source_facts.executables lists PocketSphinx command-line tools.
